user.title: DTE Energy Setup
user.description: Log into newlook.dteenergy.com, then open DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies and copy the webSecurityToken value.

reauth.title: Re-authenticate DTE Energy
reauth.description: Your session has expired. Please log in again and paste a fresh webSecurityToken.

error.invalid_token: Invalid token — please check you copied the full webSecurityToken value.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to DTE Energy. Check your network and try again.
